name: Store Module
description: Complete e-commerce functionality with products, categories, cart and orders
author: uxwVend Team

api.description: Get, add items to, or clear the current user shopping cart.
Initiate checkout and create a payment session for the current cart.
List store categories and create new ones (admin).
Get, update, or delete a single store category.
List store products and create new ones (admin).
Get, update, or delete a single store product.
List orders and create a new order (admin creates manual orders).
Get a single order or update its status (admin).
List coupons and create new ones (admin).
Update or delete a single coupon (admin).
Validate a coupon code against the current cart.
Get aggregate store statistics for the admin dashboard.
List gift codes and create new ones (admin).
Redeem a gift code for the current user.
List creator codes and create new ones (admin).
List bulk discount tiers and create new ones (admin).
List loot chests available to the current user.
List or create product delivery commands (admin).
List or create product variables used in commands (admin).
Get store widget statistics for homepage display.
Stripe webhook endpoint for payment events.
Open a loot chest and receive rewards.
Update or delete a single creator code (admin).
Delete a single gift code (admin).
Get current community goal progress or update the goal (admin).
List or create product variables used in commands (admin).
Get store widget statistics for homepage display.
List loot chests available to the current user.
Open a loot chest and receive rewards.
List or create product delivery commands (admin).
List bulk discount tiers and create new ones (admin).
List creator codes and create new ones (admin).
Update or delete a single creator code (admin).
Validate a creator code at checkout.
List gift codes and create new ones (admin).
Delete a single gift code (admin).
Redeem a gift code for the current user.
Stripe webhook endpoint for payment events.
Get current community goal progress or update the goal (admin).
Create a PayPal checkout order for the current cart.
Capture a PayPal payment after approval.
Buy store credits via the configured payment gateway.

store.title: Store
store.cartEmptyDesc: Add some items to get started
store.orderSuccessDesc: Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been placed and is being processed.
store.noProducts: No products found in this category.
store.noProductsSearch: No products found matching your search.
store.playerNameHelp: Items will be delivered to this player
store.adm_subtitle: Manage your store products and orders
store.adm_customVariablesHelp: Add fields that buyers must fill in during purchase (e.g., Minecraft username)
store.adm_deliveryCommandsHelp: RCON commands to execute on purchase. Use {player} for username.
store.adm_field4Desc: Default currency code (e.g., usd, eur, gbp)
store.adm_field5Desc: Tax rate percentage (0 for no tax)
store.adm_intervalCountHelp: Number of intervals (e.g., 3 months = interval month, count 3)
store.paymentsSubtitle: Configure Stripe and tax for store checkout
store.paymentsStripePublicKeyDesc: Found in your Stripe dashboard under Developers → API keys.
store.paymentsStripeSecretKeyDesc: Kept server-side only. Used to create payment intents.
store.paymentsStripeWebhookSecretDesc: Set the endpoint URL in Stripe to /api/v1/store/checkout/webhook and paste the signing secret here.
store.paymentsDefaultCurrencyDesc: Three-letter ISO code (e.g. usd, eur, gbp).
store.paymentsTaxRateDesc: Applied to every order. 0 disables tax.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyDesc: Add some items to get started

admin.name: Name
admin.deliveryCommandsHelp: RCON commands executed on purchase. Use {player} placeholder.
admin.customVariablesHelp: Extra fields shown to buyer (e.g. Minecraft username)
admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage your platform settings and content
admin.tab_chest_empty: Your chest is empty. Purchase items to store them here.
admin.orderSuccess_body: Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been placed and is being processed.
admin.vip_subtitle: Compare ranks and choose the best one for you
admin.cat_deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Products will be unlinked from it.
admin.cou_deleteConfirm: Delete this coupon? Customers can no longer redeem it.
admin.gc_deleteConfirm: Delete this gift code? If it was distributed but not yet redeemed, the holder will not be able to use it.
admin.err_paypalApprovalUrl: Failed to get PayPal approval URL
admin.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
admin.bd_subtitle: Reward customers who buy more — set quantity tiers that auto-apply a percentage off.
admin.bd_productIdPlaceholder: Leave empty to apply to all products
admin.cc_subtitle: Influencer affiliate codes — discount for the buyer, commission for the creator.

store.title: Mağaza
store.orderSuccessDesc: Satın aldığınız için teşekkürler. Siparişiniz alındı ve işleniyor.
store.noSubCategories: Alt kategori yok. Ürünler doğrudan gösteriliyor...
store.adm_customVariablesHelp: Satın alma sırasında alıcıların doldurması gereken alanlar ekleyin (örn. Minecraft kullanıcı adı)
store.adm_deliveryCommandsHelp: Satın almada çalıştırılacak RCON komutları. Kullanıcı adı için {player} kullanın.
store.adm_field4Desc: Varsayılan para birimi kodu (örn. usd, eur, try)
store.adm_intervalCountHelp: Aralık sayısı (örn. 3 ay = aylık aralık, sayı 3)
store.paymentsSubtitle: Mağaza ödemesi için Stripe ve vergi ayarları
store.paymentsStripePublicKeyDesc: Stripe panelinde Developers → API keys altında.
store.paymentsStripeSecretKeyDesc: Sadece sunucuda saklanır. Payment intent oluşturmak için kullanılır.
store.paymentsStripeWebhookSecretDesc: Stripe'da endpoint URL olarak /api/v1/store/checkout/webhook ekleyin, signing secret'i buraya yapıştırın.
store.paymentsDefaultCurrencyDesc: Üç harfli ISO kodu (örn. usd, eur, gbp).
store.paymentsTaxRateDesc: Her siparişe uygulanır. 0 vergi devre dışı.

admin.name: Ad
admin.deliveryCommandsHelp: Satın alma sırasında çalıştırılan RCON komutları.
admin.title: Yönetim Paneli
admin.subtitle: Platform ayarlarınızı ve içeriklerinizi yönetin
admin.tab_chest_empty: Sandığın boş. Burada saklamak için ürün satın al.
admin.orderSuccess_body: Satın aldığın için teşekkürler. Siparişin alındı ve işleniyor.
admin.vip_subtitle: Rütbeleri karşılaştır ve sana en uygun olanı seç
admin.cat_deleteConfirm: Bu kategoriyi silmek istiyor musun? Ürünlerin bağlantısı kaldırılacak.
admin.cou_deleteConfirm: Bu kuponu silmek istiyor musun? Müşteriler artık kullanamayacak.
admin.gc_deleteConfirm: Bu hediye kodu silinsin mi? Dağıtıldıysa ve henüz kullanılmadıysa, koda sahip olan kişi onu kullanamaz.
admin.err_generic: Bir şeyler ters gitti. Lütfen tekrar dene.
admin.bd_subtitle: Daha çok alana daha çok kazandırın — adet eşiği belirleyin, otomatik yüzde indirim uygulansın.
admin.bd_productIdPlaceholder: Tüm ürünlere uygulamak için boş bırakın
admin.cc_subtitle: Yayıncı/etki ajansı kodları — alıcıya indirim, üreticiye komisyon.
